message:
fix: remove dead HyperLogLog large-range correction and simplify S3-FIFO access

conflict_model.rs:
- Remove the large-range correction branch (raw_estimate > 2^32/30) from
  NitroSketch cardinality estimation. This correction was ported from the
  original HyperLogLog paper but only applies to 32-bit hash registers.
  FrankenSQLite's NitroSketch uses 64-bit hashes where the 2^32 overflow
  threshold is unreachable, making this branch dead code that could never
  trigger in practice.

s3_fifo.rs:
- Replace inline index lookup and manual field mutation with a call to the
  existing self.access(page_id) method in the AlreadyResident branch of
  admit(). The access() method performs the same index lookup and sets
  accessed = true, eliminating the redundant get_mut + field assignment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
